summary: All 6 cert-taking commands (coin facts-cert, coin apr-cert, coin images, banknote facts-cert, banknote images, refresh --cert) accept both bare cert numbers (e.g. 64674260) and full slab IDs (e.g. 7258.58/64674260) via normalizeCertNo().
reason: The user's natural input shape is the slab label printed on PCGS holders (PCGSNo.Grade/CertNo); the API only accepts the bare cert. Without normalization, slab input URL-encodes the slash and 404s. The normalizer lives in coin_batch.go and is package-level reachable. Surfaced when the user pasted 7258.58/64674260 from their pcgs-coin-list.csv.
validated_outcome: Live verified: bare + slab forms both return 1899 $1 AU58 for cert 64674260
